_notes.salary_min: Set to a number (e.g. 50000) to filter out jobs below that salary. null means no minimum filter.
_notes.locations: Jobs must match one of these. 'Remote' and 'Hybrid' match any remote/hybrid role regardless of base location.
_notes.exclude_keywords: Any job containing these terms in title or description will be skipped. Example: ['internship', 'junior', 'unpaid']
